institution.name: University of Arkansas at Little Rock

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Arkansas at Little Rock rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($19.0k → $22.2k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Arkansas at Little Rock rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.4k → $9.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Arkansas at Little Rock fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at University of Arkansas at Little Rock rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 (65.5% → 76.5%).
